title: 'They'll stop when I stop': Trump asserts Israel will stop strikes on Iran when he 'tells them to'
summary_full: President Trump asserted that Israel would follow his lead in ending the Iran war, stating they would stop military action when he decides. This comes after a Trump-directed operation, Operation Epic Fury, led to the elimination of Iran's supreme leader. Despite Netanyahu's push for a sustained offensive, Trump acknowledged Iran's resilience and sought an off-ramp amid declining domestic support.
